description: The 'Ndrina Serpa is a Mafia organization linked to the 'Ndrangheta, operating in the province of Cosenza and originating from Paola, Italy. Its activities include drug and arms trafficking, illegal waste disposal, public contract rigging, extortion, and usury. Founded by Mario Serpa, the clan has been led by various members including Nella Serpa, who took over after her brother's murder. The organization has been involved in violent feuds with rival clans.
